description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Ubuntu 18.04 that runs on every push to main and on pull requests, as well as on push to tags. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest with a container of ubuntu:18.04 for LLVM versions 9.0 and 10.0. The job should install software, fix git config, check out the repository with submodules, set build settings based on the event type, run a CI task with ansible-playbook, and publish or move the package depending on the presence of a Cloudsmith API key.
